title: Ord Simres

*[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]<ref name="Region">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' places Ord Simres southwest of [[Darkknell/Legends|Darkknell]], around the location of [[Cmaoli Di/Legends|Cmaoli Di]] as indicated by ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. As it is also located in the [[Brema sector/Legends|Brema sector]], it must be in the eastern portion of the sector, and thus also fall in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]].</ref>

'''Ord Simres''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Brema sector/Legends|Brema sector]].

{{Planet-stub}}
